message:
fix: resolve 8 correctness and feature gaps in JsRunner

1. Add .json to module resolution extensions — require("./config")
   now finds config.json without explicit extension
2. Fix createHash().digest() sync — delegate to Workers' node:crypto
   (nodejs_compat) instead of async crypto.subtle.digest()
3. Improve stripTypes — handle multi-line interfaces, generics, union
   types, enums, return type annotations, non-null assertions
4. Add ESM support — import/export syntax transformed to CJS
   require/module.exports before execution
5. Add npx dispatch — resolves bin entries from node_modules
   package.json#bin and executes via JsRunner
6. Parallelize preloadDependencies — resolve and read all dependency
   files concurrently instead of sequentially
7. Add circular require test — verifies partial export behavior
8. Add nested dependency chain test — A requires B requires C

9 new tests, 304 total passing.
